# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: Code Breach TD Art Overhaul Underway!
- Summary: We're enhancing the cyberpunk hacker aesthetic of Code Breach! An issue is open to redo the Tower Defense art, promising more immersive visuals and gameplay. Stay tuned for updates on this exciting visual upgrade.
- Slug: code-breach-td-art-redo
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Brief

- Core message: The art for Code Breach, our tower defense game, is getting a significant cyberpunk redesign. This update aims to improve the visual immersion and overall aesthetic of the game.
- CTA: Follow our progress on the Code Breach art redo!
- Visual brief: Cyberpunk hacker aesthetic, stylized game art, tower defense elements, digital glitch effects.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.

Code Breach TD Art Overhaul Underway!

We are excited to announce that the art for Code Breach, our tower defense game, is undergoing a significant redesign. The focus is on enhancing the cyberpunk hacker aesthetic to deliver a more immersive visual experience and elevate the overall gameplay feel. This update aims to bring a fresh, stylized look to the game, aligning with its core themes.

Stay tuned for updates on this visual upgrade and follow our progress.

Learn more about Code Breach: https://codegrind.online
